data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Identified target files. Living Reference: docs/reference/domain-logic.md (only reference file — does not cover portability/shim). Will create docs/reference/system-landscape.md for shim resolution and portability mechanisms. Will create docs/adr/0001-shim-sentinel-self-detection.md for the architectural decision. CLAUDE.md is read-only — will emit suggested-change report. WORKTREE-GUIDE.md already has no unexempted /Users/ paths. Drafting changes.
